requirement_topic.en: Noise: no EU-style outdoor-noise product marking
requirement_topic.zh: 噪声：无欧盟式户外噪声产品标识
requirement_topic.zht: 噪聲：無歐盟式戶外噪聲產品標識

summary.en: Peru does not run a power-tool regime equivalent to the EU outdoor-noise emission marking and guaranteed sound-power model. Noise exposure controls are generally treated through occupational and workplace safety expectations and environmental governance, with MTPE and related sectoral inspectors enforcing use-site compliance rather than a tool-placed noise declaration label.
summary.zh: 秘鲁没有与欧盟对应的电动工具户外噪声排放标识和保证声功率制度。噪声通常通过职业安全与工作场所要求、以及环境治理框架处理，由 MTPE 与相关部门在使用场所和劳动场景执法，而非在工具上贴产品噪声标签。
summary.zht: 祕魯沒有與歐盟對應的電動工具戶外噪聲排放標識和保證聲功率制度。噪聲通常通過職業安全與工作場所要求、以及環境治理框架處理，由 MTPE 與相關部門在使用場所和勞動場景執法，而非在工具上貼產品噪聲標籤。

standards_or_laws: MTPE occupational safety and noise-exposure governance
No standalone mandatory EU-style outdoor-noise marking regime for power tools in Peru

summary.en: China also treats noise largely through product-testing and workplace/industrial control frameworks, and does not use an EU-style mandatory guaranteed sound-power labeling regime for all power tools. The two systems are not directly equivalent in paperwork terms.
summary.zh: 中国也以产品测试与职场/产业控制框架处理噪声，不是所有电动工具都采用欧盟式保证声功率标签制度，两个体系在文件要求上不直接等同。
summary.zht: 中國也以產品測試與職場/產業控制框架處理噪聲，不是所有電動工具都採用歐盟式保證聲功率標籤制度，兩個體系在文件要求上不直接等同。

standards_or_laws: GB/T workplace and product noise test standards where applicable
China domestic workplace noise exposure control

gap.en: The clear gap is no product-level noise-marking gap to close for Peru. Exporters should avoid presenting EU-style outdoor-noise evidence as a mandatory Peruvian market-access duty, and should instead document that any workplace or use-site noise controls are managed by the importer/customer context.
gap.zh: 明确差距是：秘鲁不存在需要在产品层面完成的户外噪声标识。出口商不应把欧盟户外噪声证书当作秘鲁市场准入硬性材料，应说明工作场所噪声控制由进口商与用户端处理。
gap.zht: 明確差距是：祕魯不存在需要在產品層面完成的戶外噪聲標識。出口商不應把歐盟戶外噪聲證書當作祕魯市場准入硬性材料，應說明工作場所噪聲控制由進口商與使用方處理。

target.en: No mandatory EU-style guaranteed sound-power noise-marking obligation on power tools in Peru. Occupational noise control is context-specific and not a tool-level declaration gate.
target.zh: 秘鲁对电动工具不存在欧盟式的强制性保证声功率产品标识。职业噪声控制是场景化义务，不属于工具层面的市场准入宣示。
target.zht: 祕魯對電動工具不存在歐盟式的強制性保證聲功率產品標識。職業噪聲控制是場景化義務，不屬於工具層面的市場准入宣示。

cn.en: China technical files generally provide test values and workplace controls but these are not a substitute for Peru importer-level obligations.
cn.zh: 中国技术文件通常提供测试值和工作场所控制安排，但这不能替代秘鲁进口商层面的义务。
cn.zht: 中國技術文件通常提供測試值和工作場所控制安排，但這不能替代祕魯進口商層面的義務。

source.publisher: Ministerio de Trabajo y Promocion del Empleo (MTPE)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] There is no Peru product-label noise duty equivalent to EU Directive-style outdoor noise marking. Do not treat EU noise test artifacts as mandatory Peru market-entry evidence; map site-level occupational controls through importer documentation instead.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 秘鲁不存在等同欧盟指令式户外噪声标识的产品层面义务。请勿将欧盟噪声测试材料作为秘鲁市场准入硬性证据，而应通过进口商文件映射使用场景噪声控制要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 祕魯不存在等同歐盟指令式戶外噪聲標識的產品層面義務。請勿將歐盟噪聲測試材料作為祕魯市場准入硬性證據，而應透過進口商文件映射使用場景噪聲控制要求。
